text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, is a branch of computer science that creates systems capable of performing tasks that normally require human intelligence. It involves machines learning from data, a process called machine learning, where algorithms improve their performance through experience. A more advanced area is deep learning, which uses layered neural networks to handle complex patterns, like recognising faces or understanding speech. We use AI every day without always noticing—it powers search engines, recommends movies on streaming services, helps with navigation, and filters spam from our emails. As AI continues to develop, it is becoming an even more essential part of our daily lives, making tasks faster and sometimes more accurate.
